body_txt: A subversion of the Catchphrase or One-Liner where another character interrupts the expected line, usually with something disparaging. Usually takes advantage of the Dramatic Pause in the middle of the catchphrase. Also a sure sign that the once cherished phrase is now at risk of gettin' old . See also Talk to the Fist , Subverted Catchphrase . Compare Musicalis Interruptus , which is this trope applied to songs, and Finish Dialogue in Unison .
